innateAbility.name: Dumb Luck
innateAbility.description: Ogre Magi's max intelligence is always 0. Strength grants him mana and mana regeneration instead.

abilities.name: Fireblast
abilities.description: Blasts an enemy unit with a wave of fire, dealing damage and stunning the target.

abilities.name: Ignite
abilities.description: Applies damage per second and movement speed slow on the target and another random unit within the radius.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: Incites a frenzy in a friendly unit, increasing its movement speed and attack speed. Can be cast on buildings.

abilities.name: Unrefined Fireblast
abilities.description: Stuns and deals damage corresponding to the Ogre's strength.

abilities.name: Fire Shield
abilities.description: Creates a fire shield around the targeted ally, absorbing a percentage of the damage of next few attacks from enemy heroes.

abilities.name: Multicast
abilities.description: Enables Ogre Magi to cast his abilities, disregarding its cooldown.Each of Ogre Magi's abilities has its own Multicast buffer range.

talents.left: +20 Bloodlust Allied Attack Speed+35 Bloodlust Self Attack Speed
+2/+0.01 Dumb Luck Strength to Max Mana/Mana Regen
